function.name: BeginMods
function.desc: first call of every open: wipes the cache, mod list and panel

function.name: AddMod
function.desc: one per installed mod, in display order

param.name: modId
param.desc: key used by the row calls and echoed in events

param.name: default
param.desc: used by the flash-local X reset

param.name: defaultIndex
param.desc: used by the flash-local X reset

function.name: AddSlider
function.desc: slider row; value snaps to step, max 3 decimals

param.name: default
param.desc: used by the flash-local X reset

param.name: suffix
param.desc: appended verbatim to the shown value; empty for none

function.name: ShowMods
function.desc: last call of the push: builds the list and shows the first mod; zero mods = flash's own empty state

function.name: SetInput
function.desc: keybind feed from the plugin's native input listener (the engine only delivers Esc to the movie as a GFx key event): 'reset' = reset the setting under the cursor, 'back' = leave the search box (menu close is decided plugin-side via _root.searchFocused)

event.name: OnValueChanged
event.desc: user edit OR an X reset (value = the default then); fires live during slider drags. Indices mirror the plugin's push order.

param.name: itemIndex
param.desc: index in the mod's Add* push order (categories count)

param.name: value
param.desc: toggle: 0/1, dropdown: option index, slider: snapped number

event.name: OnBack
event.desc: Esc (forwarded via SetInput) while the search box is not focused; no-arg event, immune to the transport's arg loss
